title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 486.655 - Notary not to influence person on transaction — notary not to investigate document or transaction
text:
486.655.  Notary not to influence person on transaction — notary not to investigate document or transaction. — 1.  Except as otherwise provided in subsection 2 of section 486.650, a notary shall not influence a person either to enter into or avoid a transaction involving a notarial act by the notary.
  2.  A notary commission shall not authorize the notary to investigate, ascertain, or attest to the lawfulness, propriety, accuracy, or truthfulness of a document or transaction involving a notarial act.
(L. 2020 H.B. 1655)
